stemHtml: When flying an approach in low visibility using Head-Up Displays (HUD), the crew finds that some of their view of the outside world is obscured by HUD data. How shall they do?

options.a: Activate the "declutter" function to remove all but essential flight data.
options.b: Initiate a missed approach and proceed to their alternate.
options.c: Turn off the HUD and fly on PFD instruments only.
options.d: Turn off the HUD and fly visually.
